PrivateRepositorySection.title:
Private Repo Skills,

Safely Within Your Team
PrivateRepositorySection.description: Install it directly on your own infrastructure. Structure your internal repository's skill docs safely without exposing them externally.

RepositorySection.title: Browse Repositories
RepositorySection.description: Share your own skills for Claude Code and get your repository noticed. Add your repository to repositories.yaml and open a Pull Request, and we'll review it and add it to the list.

Empty.title: Set up your repository list.
Empty.description: No repositories have been registered yet. Add your repository to repositories.yaml and open a Pull Request, and we'll review it and add it to the list.

FaqSection.title: Frequently asked questions
FaqSection.description: Before you find the skill you've been looking for, here are the first questions that come to mind.

items.question: What is Skillpedia?
items.answer: An open-source project, built for Claude Code users, that collects SKILL.md documents scattered across GitHub repositories and presents them in a structured form. It is an unofficial project run by an individual, not an official GitHub service.

items.question: Is it for Claude Code users?
items.answer: Yes. Skillpedia works with the skills (SKILL.md) used in Claude Code, so it is a project for Claude Code users.

items.question: Can I use private repositories?
items.answer: Yes. Install it on your own infrastructure and register repositories via the REPOSITORIES environment variable in GitHub Actions to use them safely without exposing them externally.

Footer.footnote: Skillpedia is not an official GitHub page. It is an unofficial project run by an individual. Its purpose is to collect SKILL.md files scattered across GitHub repositories and provide them as structured documentation. It helps developers read skill docs written by engineers and understand exactly how to use them. For an AI agent to use a tool correctly, it needs a verified guide written by engineers. Skillpedia is the channel that delivers that guide most efficiently.
